code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:

Ọ bụrụ otu a, weghachite URL ebumnuche maka ntụgharị; ma ọ bụghị, laghachi na URL ngalaba maka ntụgharị.
Jiri usoro https.

Ihe atụ:

    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param domain: Ngalaba ahụ dị ka eriri, na-enweghị usoro.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shell ma weghara mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa; ADỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a ka ọ bụrụ na enyere ya mana kwupụta ya nke mbụ iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shell iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo nkeonwe DSA dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo igodo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param>`
Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.

@return Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara n'ụdị PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mmejọ mere.
ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shea ma jide mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa; ADỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a n'ihi na enyere ya mana buru ụzọ kwupụta ya iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachite ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shea iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo igodo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param>`
Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.

@weghachi Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara na usoro PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mmejọ mere.
ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shea ma jide mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa ahụ; Ọ DỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a n'ihi na enyere ya mana buru ụzọ kwupụta ya iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shea iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo_igodo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param>`
Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.
@return Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara na usoro PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mmejọ mere.
ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shea ma jide mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa ahụ; Ọ DỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a n'ihi na enyere ya mana buru ụzọ kwupụta ya iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shea iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:

Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.
@return Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara na usoro PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mmejọ mere.
ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shea ma jide mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa ahụ; Ọ DỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a n'ihi na enyere ya mana buru ụzọ kwupụta ya iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shea iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo_igodo>`

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* write_results(const char* results) {

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Nyochaa data XML wee weghachite ozi nwa akwụkwọ maka aha njirimara na okwuntughe enyere. Data XML ga-enwe usoro ndị a:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Anyị nwere ike wulite ajụjụ XPath ma jiri ya chọọ.

@param xml_data Data XML nke nwere ozi nwa akwụkwọ.
@param username Aha njirimara nke nwa akwụkwọ a ga-achọ.
@param password Okwuntughe nke nwa akwụkwọ a ga-achọ.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.

Jiri usoro https.

Ihe atụ:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"

@param domain: Ngalaba ahụ dị ka eriri, na-enweghị usoro.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *read_file_from_dir(const char *filename, const char *dir_path) {

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Nyochaa data XML wee weghachite ozi nwa akwụkwọ maka aha njirimara na okwuntughe enyere. Data XML ga-enwe usoro ndị a:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Anyị nwere ike wulite ajụjụ XPath ma jiri ya chọọ.

@param password Okwuntughe nke nwa akwụkwọ a ga-achọ.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shell ma weghara mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa; ADỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a ka ọ bụrụ na enyere ya mana kwupụta ya nke mbụ iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shell iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo igodo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param>`
Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.

@return Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara na usoro PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mperi mere.
ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shea ma jide mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa ahụ; Ọ DỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a n'ihi na enyere ya mana buru ụzọ kwupụta ya iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shea iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo_igodo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param>`
Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.

@return Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara na usoro PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mmejọ mere.
ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shea ma jide mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa ahụ; Ọ DỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a n'ihi na enyere ya mana buru ụzọ kwupụta ya iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shea iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo_igodo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param>`
Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.

@return Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara na usoro PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mmejọ mere.
ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shea ma jide mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa ahụ; Ọ DỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a n'ihi na enyere ya mana buru ụzọ kwupụta ya iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shea iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo_igodo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param>`
Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.

@return Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara na usoro PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mmejọ mere.
ọrụ iji mezuo iwu shea ma jide mmepụta ya; onye na-akpọ ya bụ ọrụ maka ịtọhapụ ebe nchekwa ahụ; Ọ DỊGHỊ mkpa imejuputa ọrụ a n'ihi na enyere ya mana buru ụzọ kwupụta ya iji jiri ya.

Mepụta igodo DSA nkeonwe, bupụ ya site na usoro PEM, ma weghachi ya dị ka eriri.
Ntụnye: mezuo iwu shea iji mepụta faịlụ param DSA na igodo DSA nkeonwe dị ka ndị a:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param> <ogologo_igodo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <faịlụ nwa oge iji chekwaa param>`
Ị nwere ike iji `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` iji mepụta aha faịlụ nwa oge pụrụ iche maka faịlụ param DSA.
@return Igodo DSA nkeonwe emepụtara na usoro PEM, ma ọ bụ NULL ma ọ bụrụ na mmejọ mere.
